understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without dying, progressing through levels until the game is won, within the 2-attempt and 50-turn limits per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hit a hazard, or reach `+`. Landing on spikes (`u`/`v`) immediately ends the attempt. CLICK targets a specific coordinate and is mainly used to remove breakable blocks (`x`) to open a fall path; it does not involve horizontal movement. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move/click.
